title: Grant McCune

'''Grant McCune''' (d. [[December 27]], [[2010]])<ref name="Guardian" /> was a modelmaker for [[Industrial Light & Magic]], and was chief modelmaker for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="SB">''[[The Star Wars Sketchbook]]''</ref>

On December 27, 2010, McCune died at home from complications of pancreatic cancer.<ref name="Canoe">{{WebCite|url=http://jam.canoe.ca/Movies/2010/12/29/16705086-wenn-story.html?cid=rssentertainment|text=Hollywood special effects guru dies|date=2010-12-29|work=[[Wikipedia:Canoe.com|canoe.ca]]|archiveurl=https://archive.is/kzPdX}}</ref>

{{Artist-stub}}
